metadata.description: Entra ID app registration client ID for authentication. Leave empty to disable auth.
Allowed client application IDs for app-to-app API access. Leave empty to allow any app that has the required API role.
Azure AI Search index name used by the API.
Entra ID app registration client ID for the Bot Service. Leave empty to skip bot deployment.
Email addresses for budget alert notifications.
App Service plan SKU name (for example: F1, B1, S1).
App Service plan SKU tier (for example: Free, Basic, Standard).
Deploy default Azure OpenAI model deployments from IaC.
Existing App Service Plan resource ID to reuse instead of creating a new plan.
Location for the App Service app. Defaults to the deployment location.
Enable VNet integration and private endpoints for production security.
Deploy RBAC role assignments for the app managed identity (requires roleAssignments/write permissions).
Append a deterministic unique suffix to globally unique resource names (Search/OpenAI) to avoid naming collisions.

variables.searchServiceName: [if(parameters('useUniqueNames'), format('{0}-search-{1}-{2}', parameters('namePrefix'), parameters('environment'), variables('uniqueSuffix')), format('{0}-search-{1}', parameters('namePrefix'), parameters('environment')))]
variables.openAiAccountName: [if(parameters('useUniqueNames'), format('{0}-openai-{1}-{2}', parameters('namePrefix'), parameters('environment'), variables('uniqueSuffix')), format('{0}-openai-{1}', parameters('namePrefix'), parameters('environment')))]
variables.keyVaultName: [if(parameters('useUniqueNames'), format('{0}-kv-{1}-{2}', parameters('namePrefix'), parameters('environment'), variables('uniqueSuffix')), format('{0}-kv-{1}', parameters('namePrefix'), parameters('environment')))]
variables.appServiceName: [if(parameters('useUniqueNames'), format('{0}-app-{1}-{2}', parameters('namePrefix'), parameters('environment'), variables('uniqueSuffix')), format('{0}-app-{1}', parameters('namePrefix'), parameters('environment')))]

metadata.description: Deploy default chat and embedding model deployments.
App Service plan SKU name (for example: F1, B1, S1).
App Service plan SKU tier (for example: Free, Basic, Standard).
Use an existing App Service Plan resource ID instead of creating one.
Location for the App Service app.
EasyAuth behavior for unauthenticated clients.
ASP.NET Core environment value (Development/Production).
Required delegated scope for API access.
Allow bypassing API authorization checks in Development only.
Allow bypassing matter-level claim checks in Development only.

properties.description: Secure AI assistant for law firm internal use

metadata.description: Email addresses to receive budget alert notifications.
Monthly budget start date (YYYY-MM-DD).
